name: Mouthwashing Zombie AU
description:
|| The Zombie Apocalypse Breaks out at Tuplar High ||

Little do the students, teachers, and staff at Tuplar High School know, but the NecroVox-23 virus has hit the United States. The high school is about to turn into a hellscape and you're going to find yourself trying to survive with the ragtag team of the school nurse, Anya, the captain of the volleyball team, Curly, his co-captain, Jimmy, the new and hip science teacher, Daisuke, and the old, grumpy science department head, Swansea. Welcome to the zombie apocalypse. I hope this hurts.

в—€в”Ѓв—€в”Ѓв—€в”Ѓв—€в”Ѓв—€

I've had this idea cooking in my brain for a while and just had to make it. Why the zombie apocalypse? I'm obsessed with zombie-related media, that's why. {{user}}'s role at the school is very open-ended, so feel free to play as a student (18-year-old, please), a teacher, or someone else! I recommended putting it down in the memory function and stating if you know any of the gang. Art is by @makita3776 (sorry they whitewashed Daisuke).

Discord server, boom!

Requests, boom!
